title: Access help all year round | Kevin Bonavia MP
meta_description: Acceptable Behaviour Policy | Kevin Bonavia MP
headings: h2: Hertfordshire Domestic Abuse Helpline - 08 088 088 088 9am-9pm Monday to Friday and 9am-4pm weekends Confidential email Kim@mailpurple.org
h2: Police Silent 999 call (If you cannot speak) - Call 999, press 55 when operator answers
text_excerpt: --> Access help all year round | Kevin Bonavia MP top of page Introduction Personal Promises Online Newsletter Stay in touch Upcoming Events Campaigns Latest News Parliament Access help all year round More Use tab to navigate through the menu items. Access help Emergency Helplines Emergency Repairs or Homelessness: Stevenage Borough Council - 01438 314963 North Herts District Council - 0300 777 4125 East Herts District Council - 01279 655261 Hertfordshire Domestic Abuse Helpline - 08 088 088 088 9am-9pm Monday to Friday and 9am-4pm weekends Confidential email Kim@mailpurple.org Police Silent 999 call (If you cannot speak) - Call 999, press 55 when operator answers Herts Help - 0300 123 4044 info@hertshelp.net Text hertshelp to 60060 ​ ​ Utilities: ​ National Grid Emergency - 0800 6783 105 www.ukpowernetworks.co.uk – 0800 300 8585 or 105 Anglian Water Emergency - 03457 145 145 National Gas Emergency - 0800 111 999 Environment Agency Report Flooding Incident Hotline – 0800 80 70 60 National Flood Forum – 01299 403 055 Mental Health Support: Single Point of Access (SPA) 24/7 Mental Health Helpline - Freephone 0800 6444 101 Samaritans 116 123 jo@samaritans.org NightLight crisis helpline If you're experiencing a mental health crisis, you can call 01923 256391 every night, 7pm – 1am. A listening ear, emotional support, advice and information. NHS 111 Press 2 to speak to the mental health line. © 2024 Promoted By Tom Plater on behalf of Kevin Bonavia MP both at Ground floor right Osprey house, Primett Road, Stevenage, SG1 3EE My Privacy Policy My Acceptable Behaviour Policy bottom of page
